mapper.select: SELECT id FROM openplatform_app_t WHERE app_id = #{appId} AND status = 1

SELECT id, parent_id, property_name, property_value, tenant_id, status, create_time, create_by, last_update_time, last_update_by FROM openplatform_app_p_t WHERE parent_id = #{appPkId} AND property_name = 'single_chatbot_account' AND status = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM openplatform_app_p_t WHERE parent_id = #{appPkId} AND property_name = 'single_chatbot_account' AND status = 1

SELECT id, parent_id, property_name, property_value, tenant_id, status, create_time, create_by, last_update_time, last_update_by FROM openplatform_app_p_t WHERE parent_id = #{appPkId} AND property_name = 'single_chatbot_account' AND property_value = #{accountId} AND status = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO openplatform_app_p_t ( id, parent_id, property_name, property_value, tenant_id, status, create_by, create_time, last_update_by, last_update_time ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{parentId}, 'single_chatbot_account', #{propertyValue}, #{tenantId}, 1, #{createBy}, NOW(3), #{lastUpdateBy}, NOW(3) )
